coin_profile.name: NEAR Protocol
coin_profile.description: NEAR Protocol is a developer-friendly Layer 1 blockchain with a focus on usability and scalability. It uses a sharding technique called Nightshade to achieve high throughput. NEAR is notable for its human-readable account names and low transaction costs.

NEAR.name: NEAR Protocol

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Margin of safety present — price near or below speculative fair value during accumulation (deep bear) phase.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 7.2/10 and survivability 80.0%. Base: 10.0% p.a., Bull: 17.0% p.a., Bear: -12.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Fee-based methods (Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple) used DeFiLlama protocol fee data to anchor the valuation. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple produced a value below 10% of current price (fees are low relative to market cap) — shown in the breakdown chart but excluded from the median pool. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Metcalfe Network Value (MC/Volume ratio) confirmed the NVT signal and contributed to the median pool. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment did not fire: FDV/MC is within the acceptable range for this quality tier, so no dilution penalty was applied. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

NEAR.iv_method: Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark

bull_points: Multi-year on-chain data available — protocol has an established track record of fee generation across market cycles
Strong quality score of 7.2/10 (Safe) across all key metrics
NEAR Protocol maintains a top-51 market cap position with established liquidity
bear_points: DCF model suggests NEAR Protocol is trading at a 7400.0% premium to fair value (est. $0.02)
High MC/Fees ratio of 433.48x means investors are paying a large premium relative to actual protocol fee generation
Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets
